name: eLead1One Automotive Dealer CRM API
what_it_does: eLead1One (CDK Global) automotive dealer CRM REST API for multi-channel lead management, BDC automation, and customer lifecycle management for franchised automotive dealerships. Enables AI agents to manage multi-source lead aggregation and deduplication for dealer lead management automation, handle BDC call tracking and callback scheduling for inbound lead handling automation, access equity mining and vehicle ownership portfolio management for conquest and retention marketing automation, retrieve desking and deal status integration for F&I pipeline automation, manage service CRM and service appointment follow-up for dealership service lane automation, handle email, SMS, and voice communication templates for customer lifecycle automation, access showroom management and visit tracking for in-store sales process automation, retrieve sales performance reporting and lead source ROI for dealership analytics automation, manage OEM lead program integration and response time tracking for OEM compliance automation, and integrate eLead with CDK Drive DMS, Reynolds & Reynolds, and OEM lead management platforms for end-to-end automotive retail automation.
use_cases: Aggregating dealer leads from BDC automation agents
Mining equity opportunities from retention marketing agents
Tracking OEM lead response from compliance automation agents
Managing service follow-up from service CRM agents
not_for: Dealer parts and service DMS operations (use CDK Drive or Reynolds)
Vehicle financing and F&I product management
best_when: A franchised automotive dealer or dealer group wanting AI agents to automate multi-channel lead management, BDC workflow, equity mining, and service CRM within eLead1One as the dealer CRM platform.
avoid_when: TCPA CONSENT FOR AUTOMATED CALLING AND TEXTING: Automated BDC calling and SMS texting via eLead requires TCPA prior express written consent; automated dialer campaigns without per-customer consent verification create TCPA class action exposure; implement consent verification before automated BDC outreach. CDK ACQUISITION INTEGRATION UNCERTAINTY: eLead1One was acquired by CDK Global; eLead integration roadmap with CDK Drive DMS and CDK CRM is evolving; verify current API investment and CDK eLead integration strategy before building deep eLead-specific automation. OEM LEAD SLA COMPLIANCE FOR PROGRAM PARTICIPATION: Automated OEM lead routing must deliver within OEM-specified response time SLA (typically 15-30 minutes for internet leads); automated routing with latency beyond OEM SLA creates OEM program compliance violation and lead program fee forfeiture.

auth.notes: eLead1One uses OAuth and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Destin, Florida HQ (CDK Global subsidiary). eLead1One founded 2000. Acquired by CDK Global. Multi-channel dealer CRM with equity mining, BDC, and service CRM. 3,500+ dealer rooftops. OEM lead program certified (GM, Ford, Toyota, Honda). CDK Drive DMS integration. Competes with VinSolutions, DealerSocket (Solera), and Reynolds & Reynolds CRM for dealer CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per dealer rooftop
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per dealership; module pricing for equity mining, service CRM, and BDC; CDK suite bundling available
pricing.notes: Destin FL (CDK Global). Annual subscription per dealer rooftop. 3,500+ dealer customers. CDK suite pricing for bundled CDK Drive + eLead.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; lead and customer queries throttled; webhooks for lead and appointment events

known_agent_gotchas: CDK ACQUISITION PLATFORM CONSOLIDATION RISK: eLead1One is being integrated into CDK Global platform suite; standalone eLead API endpoints may consolidate into CDK unified platform over time; validate eLead vs CDK CRM API roadmap with CDK account team before building deep eLead-specific automation investment

TCPA AUTOMATED DIALER CONSENT VERIFICATION: eLead BDC auto-dialer integration requires TCPA prior express written consent for each customer phone number; automated dialer campaigns using eLead call lists must filter to consented contacts only; automated calling without consent verification creates TCPA class action risk

OEM INTERNET LEAD RESPONSE TIME SLA: eLead OEM lead program integration tracks internet lead response time for OEM compliance; automated routing workflows must achieve OEM-specified response time (typically 15-30 minute initial response, 2-hour appointment offer); automated routing with latency above OEM threshold triggers OEM program compliance review

EQUITY MINING DATA FRESHNESS FOR VEHICLE VALUATION: eLead equity mining calculations use vehicle trade value estimates; automated equity mining outreach based on stale vehicle valuation data (more than 30 days old in volatile market) creates inaccurate trade-in offer and customer disappointment; implement vehicle valuation refresh cadence for equity mining workflows

DUPLICATE LEAD DEDUPLICATION ACROSS SOURCES: eLead multi-channel lead aggregation from multiple sources (website, Autotrader, Cars.com, OEM) may create duplicate customer records; automated lead routing without deduplication creates duplicate BDC outreach to same customer; implement customer identity resolution before automated lead processing

SERVICE CRM WRITE-BACK TO DMS: eLead service CRM appointment and RO status depends on CDK Drive or Reynolds DMS write-back; automated service follow-up based on eLead service data may lag DMS RO status by sync interval; implement DMS data timestamp check for time-sensitive service CRM automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Automotive dealer CRM. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer PII, vehicle purchase history, and sales data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Dealer CRM. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer PII, vehicle purchase intent, and sales data.
